The question is asking to determine in which venue the Vikings played after their game at Mile High Stadium. Since there is a sequential order to the games (indicated by the order of the rows), we need to sort the data using the f_sort_column(opponent) operation with the order "small to large" (or "large to small" if the timestamps were numerical) to see the sequence of games and identify the venue that follows Mile High Stadium.

The Vikings played at Mile High Stadium against the Denver Broncos (row 1) and then played at Soldier Field against the Chicago Bears (row 2). Therefore, the venue they played in after Mile High Stadium was Soldier Field.
